教科書/Required texts0: NOTE: To ensure you benefit most from the class, DO NOT USE second-hand textbooks that contain another person's answers to activities. You MUST have a new book to complete all activities.
教科書/Required texts1: Q Skills for Success: Reading and Writing 2 (Fourth Edition) - See note below
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Fluency writing 10%, Writing Skills (textbook based projects) 40%, Email & online written communication 20%, Continuous assessment 30%
備考Note0: NOTE: A more detailed syllabus will be given on the first day of class. There may be some changes regarding the class schedule and grading criteria. Make sure to read and follow the course syllabus, weekly schedule, and any other information given to you by your teacher in class.
